text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: A real paper by Boczar et al. exists in *Aesthetic Surgery Journal* (2024) on this topic, but its actual title is "3D Breast Scanning in Plastic Surgery Utilizing Free iPhone LiDAR Application: Evaluation, Potential, and Limitations" — not the cited title "...utilizing free iphone lidar applications and standard consumer devices: A comparative analysis." The cited title is a fabricated variant with a different subtitle and altered wording, and was not found in any academic database.
LINK: https://academic.oup.com/asj/article-abstract/45/4/NP99/7941969
